chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No.D-2738 of 2025 Date Order with signature of the Judge 1. For orders on office objection No.1 to 5. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.07.2025 Mr. Altaf Hussain Advocate for the Petitioner Qazi Amjad Islam Advocate for respondent No.4 Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General along with Inspector Alman Inspector CBC Karachi *************** Comments have been filed by Maliha Alman Inspector CBC Karachi on behalf of respondents No. to 3, taken on record. Learned Assistant Attorney General submits that Enquiry No. 95 of 2024 is pending against the Petitioner. Learned counsel for the Petitioner seeks disposal of this Petition and submits that FIA may be directed to act strictly in accordance with the Law. Such proposal has not been opposed by the learned Assistant Attorney General. In view of above, this Constitution Petition is disposed of with direction to the FIA to act strictly in accordance with the Law. J U D G E J U D G E brohips
